description_long: This is a manual wheelchair with a black metal frame and two large spoked rear wheels, each equipped with a push rim for self-propulsion. The seat and backrest are made of a dark, slightly worn fabric or vinyl material, providing a utilitarian and durable appearance. The wheelchair features two smaller front caster wheels for maneuverability and two metal footrests with a textured, perforated surface for grip. The armrests are straight and parallel to the seat, constructed from the same black metal tubing as the frame. The push handles at the back are capped with white grips, offering a comfortable hold for an attendant. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for use on urban sidewalks, in parks, or within buildings.
description: A black manual wheelchair with large spoked rear wheels, push rims, and a sturdy metal frame. It features a dark fabric seat, metal footrests, and white-capped push handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seat, backrest, armrests, and both footrests clearly, with the large rear wheels partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked rear wheel, push rim, armrest, and the alignment of the footrests and front caster wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest, both push handles with white grips, and the rear wheels from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other large rear wheel, armrest, and the footrests' position relative to the frame.
attribute_wheel_type: Two large rear spoked wheels with push rims and two small solid front caster wheels; rear wheels are much larger and have thin tires.
attribute_frame_design: Rigid frame with straight tubular steel construction and cross-bracing beneath the seat for stability.
attribute_footrest_style: Fixed metal footrests with a rectangular, perforated design, positioned side by side and not swing-away.
attribute_handlebar_configuration: Standard straight push handles with white cylindrical grips, extending vertically from the backrest.
